zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Cramlington於1407年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德普雷斯頓時，她的父親Lord William Cramlington30歲，母親Mrs. William Cramlington30歲。她於1425年之前與William Lawson結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1466年10月16日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德可拉苗林頓享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Cramlington was born in 1407, in Preston, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Lord William Cramlington, was 30 and her mother, Mrs. William Cramlington, was 30. She married William Lawson before 1425. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 16 October 1466, in Cramlington, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Cramlington(이)가 1407년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 프레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord William Cramlington(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. William Cramlington(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1425년 이전 William Lawson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1466년 10월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 크램링턴에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.
